# Raghav Gajavelli

> Tech × Creativity × Human Story

Raghav Gajavelli is a Senior Product Manager and Lead Systems Architect based in Hoofddorp (Amsterdam area), Netherlands. Originally from South India, he moved to Amsterdam in 2018.

## About

Raghav has 17+ years of experience building complex AI and enterprise systems for large organisations. He combines enterprise-scale product and architecture expertise with creative work in portrait photography and writing. Family: wife, two kids, a dog brought from India.

## Work

- Senior Product Manager & Lead Systems Architect — AI-powered knowledge management systems deployed at scale across large customer service operations
- Founder/Author — "Enough is Enough" newsletter on Substack (AI, systems thinking, personal growth for business owners)
- Portrait Photographer — The Portrait Experience project: photographing entrepreneurs across the Netherlands
- Open source — Visual Cryptography GUI (GitHub: RaghavGajavelli)
- Writer — Content about AI tools, productivity systems, and building in public

## Skills

Product Strategy, AI Prototyping & Automation, Lead Systems Architecture, Portrait Photography, Visual Storytelling, Creative Writing, Content Creation, Systems Thinking, Figma, Notion
